note: Estimated heat-related deaths per summer in Europe. 2022-2024 from the Nature Medicine excess-mortality series (Ballester et al. and follow-ups); 2003 from the classic Robine et al. estimate, a different methodology, flagged as such in the chart.

france2026.hottestDaysEver: June 24-25, 2026 — France's hottest average days ever recorded, any month
france2026.peakConcentration: ≈56% of the excess deaths fell in or just after the June 25-27 peak
